package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_accepts_more_than_one_body_contract: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that try to bind or manually parse multiple body DTOs in one request path.
type CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractModel
}

type CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractService struct {
    repo *CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContract(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_handler_accepts_more_than"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractService{repo: &CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContractModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    var jsonDTO struct {
        Name  string `json:"name"`
        Email string `json:"email"`
    }
    var formDTO struct {
        Name  string `form:"name"`
        Email string `form:"email"`
    }
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&jsonDTO)
    c.ShouldBind(&formDTO)
    return nil
}
